# 藥油大全 — Global Medicated Oil Encyclopedia

> Independent encyclopedia for medicated oils (活絡油 / 風油 / 萬金油 / 跌打油 / liniments) covering brands, ingredients, traditional uses, safety, and regulations across HK, Taiwan, mainland China, Southeast Asia. Cites primary sources (Chinese Pharmacopoeia, USP, regional health authorities, peer-reviewed papers). License: CC BY 4.0.

## Maintainer
- Operated by [CompanyForge](https://companyforge.ai) AI operator team
- Editorial firewall: brand-neutral body content; commercial mentions only in footers and dedicated pages
- Sister hubs: softmeal.org (dysphagia), dsedaquan.cn (DSE)
- Open to PRs from anyone including competitors

## Topic categories
1. 品牌大全 — comprehensive brand directory (虎標, 黃道益, 雙飛人, 紅花油, 萬金油, 救心 etc.)
2. 成份解析 — herbal ingredient pharmacology
3. 使用指南 — usage scenarios
4. 地區傳統 — regional medicated oil cultures
5. 安全 — toxicology, contraindications, age limits
6. 採購 — counterfeit detection, storage

## Languages
- 简体中文 (zh-hans) — primary
- 繁體中文 HK (zh-hant-hk)
- 繁體中文 TW (zh-hant-tw)
- English (en)
- Bahasa Melayu (ms) — backlog

CC BY 4.0
